column1:
create or replace TABLE SKILLS_DETAILS (
	SKILL_ID NUMBER(38,0),
	EMPLOYEE_ID NUMBER(38,0),
	SKILL_NAME VARCHAR(100),
	SKILL_CATEGORY VARCHAR(100),
	PROFICIENCY_LEVEL VARCHAR(30),
	YEARS_OF_EXPERIENCE NUMBER(4,1),
	IS_PRIMARY_SKILL BOOLEAN,
	LAST_USED_DATE DATE,
	SELF_RATING NUMBER(2,1),
	VERIFIED_BY_MANAGER BOOLEAN,
	CREATED_AT TIMESTAMP_NTZ(9)
);
